creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
Created attachment 188174
self-service-password-upd-1.1.patch

There is new version of Self service password manager. So I've made a patch to update new version.

I've made a port testing with poudriere. You can check logs at: http://pkg.bsdserwis.com/pkg/data/11x64-testing/2017-11-19_22h58m09s/logs/self-service-password-1.1.log

Also I've tested in against php71. You can check poudriere logs at: http://pkg.bsdserwis.com/pkg/data/11x64-testing-php71/2017-11-19_23h02m50s/logs/self-service-password-1.1.log

I hope it will be updated soon.
